'''''Ellichon''''' was an [[Airam (group)|Airam]] [[Delta-class JV-7 escort shuttle|''Delta''-class JV-7 escort shuttle]]. During the operations of [[Task Force Vengeance]], it was unfortunate enough to cross paths with the Star Destroyer [[Rage (Imperial-class)|''Rage'']] and the Interdictor Cruiser ''[[Compellor]]'' near the [[Blair Cluster/Legends|Blair Cluster]] where the two Imperial vessels were watching for illegal activity. Being less than legal itself, ''Ellichon'' was among those captured.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
